events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need evaluate sequence check for EMT bending & installation commercial project. Observed field condition: missing support within 3 ft of box. Work actively in progress. Reference NEC Art. 358 (EMT), Ch.9 fill. Need determine decision fail because non-compliant. Need list component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Work stage in-progress. percent_complete maybe 60? value not asked, 0. sound_source etc 0/null? Schema says string for sound_source, number for event_time, rate. Use empty string and 0. order and workable arrays empty? The task asks evaluate procedure sequence and state what must happen before work can continue. We can include actions: install support/strap within required distance, verify spacing per NEC 358.30, inspect before continuing. Findings: missing support within 3 ft of box violates NEC 358.30 (securely fastened within 3 ft of box). References: NEC Art. 358.30. Need ensure JSON valid. Also component_conditions categories may apply: installed-defective, non-compliant. Should we include worn/degraded/failed? No. Risk maybe medium? Missing support can cause conduit movement, wire damage, inspection fail. Could be medium. Decision fail. Rationale brief. Workable empty. Order empty because not audio/video? The task says use order for audio/video-native tasks when requested. Not requested, but schema requires array. Use empty list. Confidence 1.0. event_time 0.0, rate 0.0, sound_source "". percent_complete estimate maybe 70? Let's think. EMT bending & installation in progress, missing support near box. Overall progress maybe 65%. Not critical. Need produce JSON only. Ensure no markdown fences.
